# Dashboard UI Project

This project is a responsive dashboard interface built with HTML and CSS.
The goal of the project is to practice modern layout techniques such as Flexbox, responsive design, hover effects, cards, tables, and navigation menus.

I used my

</svg>
 own design as a example to create that dashboard:
<img width="1440" height="1024" alt="main dashboard" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/69aa3d83-4ce9-486a-9197-fa811ca173c2" />

## Features

* Sticky navigation bar
* Sidebar menu with hover effects
* Dashboard statistic cards
* Analytics section
* Recent activity panel
* Responsive layout for smaller screens
* Search bar and profile section
* Projects table

## Technologies Used

* HTML5
* CSS3
* Flexbox
* Media Queries

## What I Practiced

During this project, I practiced:

* Creating responsive layouts
* Using Flexbox for alignment
* Styling cards and tables
* Adding hover animations
* Building dashboard-style UI components
* Organizing HTML and CSS structure

## Project Structure

* `index.html` → main HTML structure
* `style.css` → all styling and responsive design

## Purpose

This project was created as an HTML & CSS practice assignment to improve front-end development skills and understand how modern dashboard interfaces are built.
